title: Babylone
description: Man's ambition is limited only by his imagination, and Create's stress system.
body:
# Babylone To the sky! A simple and \*lightweight\* fabric mod list focused on the Create mod and ComputerCraft. ## How to use it ### Persistent groups As of 2.0, Simple Voice Chat Enhanced Groups is available in the modpack. To enable global default groups, with op rights, do : - `/persistentgroup add []` which will create a new persistent group which will not be removed when empty, with the specified name, and mode: - `normal` means that you will be able to hear people in proximity but not respond to them - `open` means that you can hear people in proximity and respond to them - `isolated` means that you won't hear people in proximity and they won't hear you Then, tell players to do the following: - `/autojoingroup set ` where `group-name` is the same as in the previous step After doing the second step, players will be put in the group immediatly when they join the world. For example, you can do: `/persistentgroup add "Where is my wrench?" open` and players can type: `/autojoingroup set "Where is my wrench?"`. In this configuration, players will join the group "Where is my wrench?" when they join without having to do anything, and still chat normally with people in the world who are not in the group.
